results.rendered_html:
uddhartṛ, uddhāraka a.
1 One who raises or lifts up.
2 A sharer, coheir.
3 One who recovers property.
— m.
1 A destroyer, exterminator;  Y. 2. 271. 
2 A saviour, deliverer.
